name: vercel
description: Reads deployments, projects, teams, domains, aliases, webhooks, log drains, and edge configs from the Vercel REST API, and writes projects, deployments, domains, project environment variables, webhooks, log drains, edge configs, and alias removal.

risk.read: external Vercel API read of deployment, project, team, domain, alias, webhook, log-drain, and edge-config data
risk.write: external mutation of Vercel projects, deployments, domains, environment variables, webhooks, log drains, edge configs, and aliases; approval required
risk.approval: read: none; write: required for every action
